summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with production experience in computer vision, Python-based ML pipelines, and containerized deployment on Kubernetes. Built and deployed a YOLO-based object detection system that improved accuracy by 30%, scaled training data through automated augmentation pipelines, and containerized inference workloads for horizontal scaling under variable load. Experienced working across multi-functional teams and comfortable in fast-paced engineering environments with cross-disciplinary collaboration.

skills.languages: Python, C++ (familiar), JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar)
skills.ml: Computer Vision, Object Detection, YOLO, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, NLP, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Semantic Search, Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Git
